subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-07-08 in Akka
subcodes.first_line: Man must be tireless in his effort. Once his effort is directed in the proper channel, if he does not succeed today he shall succeed tomorrow.
subcodes.subjects: @effort; striving, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @fulfillment of true potential
